EcHeaderOffset.label: EC Header offset
EcHeaderOffset.help_text: Range 1 offset covers manifest, cannot be changed

EcHeaderSize.label: Range 0 size
EcHeaderSize.help_text: Range 1 size covers manifest, cannot be changed

EcBootLoaderOffset.label: EC Header offset
EcBootLoaderOffset.help_text: Range 1 offset covers manifest, cannot be changed

EcBootLoaderSize.label: EcBootLoader size
EcBootLoaderSize.help_text: Range 1 size covers manifest, cannot be changed

EcConfigOffset.label: EC Config offset
EcConfigOffset.help_text: Range 1 offset covers manifest, cannot be changed

EcConfigSize.label: EcConfig size
EcConfigSize.help_text: Range 1 size covers manifest, cannot be changed

ECLLogEnable.label: EC DEBUG LOG Enable - Enable:0x01 - Disable:0x00

ECLogLevel.label: EC debug logs level setting, Error=bit0,Warn=bit1,Info=bit2,Debug=bit3

ECShellEnable.label: EC Shell Function Enable - Enable:0x01 - Disable:0x00

ECSleepEnable.label: EC Sleep Function Enable - Enable:0x01 - Disable:0x00

board_sys_config_0.label: Invalid Instruction 1
board_sys_config_0.help_text: This setting allows customers to configure invalid instruction to protect against Chip Erase. Note: This setting should be set to '0' if there are not Invalid instructions.

board_sys_config_1.label: Invalid Instruction 2
board_sys_config_1.help_text: This setting allows customers to configure invalid instruction to protect against Chip Erase. Note: This setting should be set to '0' if there are not Invalid instructions.
